quests.name: Hero Origin
quests.description: The Warden's origin story before joining the Grey Wardens.

quests.name: Joining the Grey Wardens
quests.description: Travel to Ostagar and undergo the Grey Warden initiation ritual.

quests.name: Tainted Blood
quests.description: Collect darkspawn blood and Grey Warden treaties from the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: The Tower of Ishal
quests.description: Light the beacon at the top of the Tower of Ishal to signal Loghain's charge.

quests.name: Lothering and the Imperial Highway
quests.description: Travel through Lothering and gather allies before it falls to the Blight.

quests.name: The Arl of Redcliffe
quests.description: Seek the aid of Arl Eamon of Redcliffe for the fight against the Blight.

quests.name: The Hungry Deserter
quests.description: A deserter at Ostagar begs for food.

quests.name: The Mabari Hound
quests.description: A sick mabari war hound in the Ostagar kennels needs help.

quests.name: The Grey Warden's Cache
quests.description: Find the hidden Grey Warden cache in the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: The Missionary
quests.description: Find a missionary's corpse and the key he carried in the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: Chasind Trail Signs
quests.description: Locate the Chasind trail signs in the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: Last Will and Testament
quests.description: Deliver a dead soldier's will found in the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: A Pinch of Ashes
quests.description: Collect ashes from a Chasind camp in the Korcari Wilds.

quests.name: Broken Circle
quests.description: The Circle of Magi has fallen into chaos. Abominations roam the tower.

quests.name: First Enchanter Irving
quests.description: The fate of First Enchanter Irving during the Broken Circle.

quests.name: Cullen's Request
quests.description: Cullen asks the Warden to kill the mages in the Tower.

quests.name: Five Pages, Four Mages
quests.description: Find the torn pages of a love letter scattered across the Circle Tower.

quests.name: Summoning Sciences
quests.description: Use the summoning fonts on the second floor of the Circle Tower.

quests.name: Watchguard of the Reaching
quests.description: Solve the statue puzzle on the third floor of the Circle Tower.

quests.name: The Urn of Sacred Ashes
quests.description: Find the legendary Urn of Sacred Ashes to cure Arl Eamon.

quests.name: Friends of Red Jenny
quests.description: Find caches hidden around Ferelden for the mysterious Friends of Red Jenny.

quests.name: Back Alley Justice
quests.description: Deal with thugs causing trouble in the back alleys.

quests.name: The Last Request
quests.description: Fulfill the last request of a dying templar in the village of Haven.

quests.name: Unbound
quests.description: An undead warrior seeks release from bondage in the Gauntlet.

quests.name: Drake Scale Armor
quests.description: Collect drake scales to have Wade craft special armor.

quests.name: Dragon Scale Armor
quests.description: Bring dragon scales to Wade for the finest armor in Ferelden.

quests.name: A Village Under Siege
quests.description: Help the village of Redcliffe prepare for an undead attack.

quests.name: The Attack at Nightfall
quests.description: Fight alongside the people of Redcliffe against the undead hordes.

quests.name: The Possessed Child
quests.description: Connor, the son of Arl Eamon, has been possessed by a demon.

quests.name: A Missing Child
quests.description: Help Kaitlyn find her brother Bevin in Redcliffe.

quests.name: Lost in the Castle
quests.description: Owen the blacksmith's daughter Valena is trapped in the castle.

quests.name: A Stiff Drink
quests.description: The fate of Bella the tavern waitress in Redcliffe.

quests.name: Nature of the Beast
quests.description: A curse plagues the Brecilian Forest. Werewolves and Dalish elves are in conflict.

quests.name: Cammen's Lament
quests.description: Cammen has a broken heart in the Dalish camp.

quests.name: Elora's Halla
quests.description: Elora's halla is sick and needs help.

quests.name: Lost to the Curse
quests.description: Tell Athras about the fate of his wife Danyla.

quests.name: Rare Ironbark
quests.description: Bring Varathorn the ironbark he needs for crafting.

quests.name: Wounded in the Forest
quests.description: An injured elf named Deygan lies wounded in the Brecilian Forest.

quests.name: The Elven Ritual
quests.description: Complete the elven ritual in the Brecilian Forest ruins.

quests.name: The Mage's Treasure
quests.description: Find the pieces of the Juggernaut armor set hidden in the Brecilian Forest.

quests.name: The Arcane Warrior
quests.description: An ancient elven warrior imprisoned in a life gem offers his secrets.

quests.name: A Paragon of Her Kind
quests.description: Settle the succession crisis in Orzammar between Bhelen and Harrowmont.

quests.name: Anvil of the Void
quests.description: Find the Anvil of the Void in the Deep Roads and decide its fate.

quests.name: A Mother's Hope
quests.description: Filda asks the Warden to find her son Ruck in the Deep Roads.

quests.name: An Unlikely Scholar
quests.description: Dagna wants to study at the Circle Tower.

quests.name: Noble Hunters
quests.description: Encounter with Mardy in Orzammar (Dwarf Noble origin).

quests.name: Of Noble Birth
quests.description: Mardy's son and his birthright in Orzammar.

quests.name: The Dead Caste
quests.description: Prove to the Shaperate that the Legion of the Dead is connected to a noble house.

quests.name: Thief in the House of Learning
quests.description: A tome has been stolen from the Shaperate.

quests.name: The Chant in the Deeps
quests.description: Help Brother Burkel create a Chantry in Orzammar.

quests.name: Zerlinda's Woe
quests.description: Zerlinda and her son are outcast in Dust Town.

quests.name: Lost to the Memories
quests.description: Help Orta find proof to join the Assembly as House Ortan.

quests.name: Precious Metals
quests.description: Rogek wants help with a lyrium deal in Orzammar.

quests.name: A Lost Nug
quests.description: Find a lost nug for its owner in Orzammar.

quests.name: Caged in Stone
quests.description: A Dwarven casteless has been arrested. Decide his fate.

quests.name: Exotic Methods
quests.description: Help the smith Dagna's father with an unusual request in Orzammar.

quests.name: Jammer's Stash
quests.description: Find Jammer's hidden stash in Dust Town.

quests.name: Proving After Dark
quests.description: Participate in underground proving matches in Orzammar.

quests.name: The Key to the City
quests.description: Find the mysterious key to the city in Orzammar.

quests.name: The Shaper's Life
quests.description: Assist the Shaper of Memories in Orzammar.

quests.name: An Admirable Topsider
quests.description: An Orzammar merchant needs a surface item from the Deep Roads.

quests.name: Asunder
quests.description: Explore the haunted tunnels in the Deep Roads.

quests.name: Honor Bound
quests.description: Ser Landry challenges the Warden to a duel in Denerim.

quests.name: Tortured Noble
quests.description: Tell Bann Sighard about finding Oswyn in Arl Howe's dungeon.

quests.name: Crime Wave
quests.description: Complete Slim Couldry's series of crimes in Denerim.

quests.name: Lost Templar
quests.description: Give Alfstanna her brother Irminric's ring.

quests.name: Hearing Voices
quests.description: Return a worn amulet to the beggar woman in Denerim's alienage.

quests.name: Forgotten Verses
quests.description: Bring an ancient encrypted scroll to Sister Justine in Denerim.

quests.name: Pearls Before Swine
quests.description: Help Sergeant Kylon clear the White Falcons out of the Pearl.

quests.name: The Crimson Oars
quests.description: Handle the Crimson Oars gang for Sergeant Kylon in Denerim.

quests.name: The Trial of Crows
quests.description: Complete Master Ignacio's assassination missions.

quests.name: Captured!
quests.description: The Warden is captured by Ser Cauthrien and must escape Fort Drakon.

quests.name: Something Wicked
quests.description: Investigate the orphanage in the Denerim Alienage.

quests.name: Missing in Action
quests.description: Find missing soldiers during the Landsmeet.

quests.name: Fazzil's Request
quests.description: Help Fazzil with a task in Denerim.

quests.name: Rescue the Queen
quests.description: Rescue Queen Anora from Arl Howe's estate in Denerim.

stages.name: Infiltrate Howe's estate to rescue Anora

quests.name: The Landsmeet
quests.description: Gather support and decide who will rule Ferelden.

quests.name: Battle of Denerim
quests.description: The final battle against the Archdemon.

quests.name: Bandits on the Road
quests.description: Deal with the bandits blocking the highway to Lothering.

quests.name: A Fallen Templar
quests.description: A dead templar's body is found on the bridge outside Lothering.

quests.name: More Than Just Plants
quests.description: Find herbs for Elder Miriam in Lothering.

quests.name: A Poisonous Proposition
quests.description: A merchant in Lothering sells suspicious goods.

quests.name: Traps Are a Girl's Best Friend
quests.description: Allison in Lothering needs help with a trap problem.

quests.name: Bandits, Bandits, Everywhere
quests.description: Clear bandits from the outskirts of Lothering.

quests.name: When Bears Attack
quests.description: Blighted bears threaten the people north of Lothering.

quests.name: A Last Keepsake
quests.description: Locate the remains of Goodwife Sarha near Lothering.

quests.name: Romance
quests.description: The Warden's romantic relationship.

quests.name: Recruit Dog
quests.description: Recruit the Mabari war hound as a companion.

quests.name: The Qunari Prisoner
quests.description: Free Sten from his cage in Lothering.

quests.name: Sten's Sword
quests.description: Find and return Sten's sword Asala.

quests.name: Recruit Oghren
quests.description: Recruit the dwarven berserker Oghren in Orzammar.

quests.name: Recruit Zevran
quests.description: Spare and recruit the Antivan Crow assassin Zevran.

quests.name: Recruit Wynne
quests.description: Recruit the Circle mage Wynne at the Broken Circle.

quests.name: Recruit Leliana
quests.description: Recruit the Orlesian bard Leliana in Lothering's tavern.

quests.name: Flemeth's Real Grimoire
quests.description: Find Flemeth's real grimoire for Morrigan.

quests.name: Morrigan's Ritual
quests.description: Morrigan proposes a dark ritual before the final battle.

quests.name: Alistair's Family
quests.description: Help Alistair track down his half-sister Goldanna in Denerim.

quests.name: Leliana's Past
quests.description: Confront Marjolaine about Leliana's past as a bard.

quests.name: Oghren's Old Flame
quests.description: Help Oghren reconnect with his old flame Felsi.

quests.name: Wynne's Regret
quests.description: Help Wynne find her former apprentice Aneirin.

quests.name: Brothers and Sons
quests.description: A Chanter's Board quest to deliver news to grieving families.

quests.name: Caravan Down
quests.description: Investigate a caravan that was attacked on the road.

quests.name: Desperate Haven
quests.description: Help refugees fleeing the darkspawn.

quests.name: Jowan's Intention
quests.description: Investigate Jowan's actions at Redcliffe.

quests.name: Loghain's Push
quests.description: Disrupt Loghain's supply lines.

quests.name: Skin Deep
quests.description: Deal with bandits targeting travelers.

quests.name: Unintended Consequences
quests.description: Resolve a situation caused by well-meaning actions gone wrong.

quests.name: Dereliction of Duty
quests.description: Track down deserters for the Blackstone Irregulars.

quests.name: Scraping the Barrel
quests.description: Recruit new members for the Blackstone Irregulars.

quests.name: Grease the Wheels
quests.description: Deliver supplies to Blackstone Irregulars outposts.

quests.name: Notice of Death
quests.description: Deliver death notices for the Blackstone Irregulars.

quests.name: Restocking the Guild
quests.description: Collect equipment for the Blackstone Irregulars.

quests.name: A Change in Leadership
quests.description: Resolve a leadership crisis within the Blackstone Irregulars.

quests.name: Places of Power
quests.description: Locate magical sites for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Notice of Termination
quests.description: Deliver termination notices for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Have You Seen Me?
quests.description: Track down missing mages for the Collective.

quests.name: The Scrolls of Banastor
quests.description: Recover scrolls for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Herbal Magic
quests.description: Gather herbs for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Blood Warning
quests.description: Investigate blood magic for the Collective.

quests.name: Careless Accusations
quests.description: Clear a mage falsely accused of using forbidden magic.

quests.name: Thy Brother's Killer
quests.description: Track a killer for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Justice Must Be Served
quests.description: Deliver justice for the Mages' Collective.

quests.name: Dead Drops
quests.description: Deliver packages to dead drops for an interested party.

quests.name: False Witness
quests.description: Plant false evidence to frame a target.

quests.name: Harsh Decisions
quests.description: Make a difficult choice for an interested party.

quests.name: Negotiation Aids
quests.description: Acquire items to help in negotiations.

quests.name: New Ground
quests.description: Establish new territory for an interested party.

quests.name: Signs of Safe Passage
quests.description: Mark safe routes through dangerous territory.

quests.name: Solving Problems
quests.description: Eliminate targets for the Antivan Crows.

quests.name: Untraceable
quests.description: Dispose of evidence for the Crows.

quests.name: Soldier's Peak
quests.description: Explore the ancient Grey Warden fortress and deal with Avernus.

quests.name: The Stone Prisoner
quests.description: Investigate the village of Honnleath and the stone golem.

quests.name: A Golem's Memories
quests.description: Help Shale recover memories of her past life.

quests.name: Return to Ostagar
quests.description: Return to the ruins of Ostagar to recover King Cailan's arms and armor.

quests.name: The Architect
quests.description: Decide the fate of the intelligent darkspawn known as the Architect.

quests.name: The Siege
quests.description: Defend Vigil's Keep or the city of Amaranthine from darkspawn.

quests.name: Assault on Vigil's Keep
quests.description: Defend Vigil's Keep from the initial darkspawn attack.

quests.name: It Comes From Beneath
quests.description: Investigate darkspawn tunnels beneath Vigil's Keep.

quests.name: The Righteous Path
quests.description: Travel to the Wending Wood to investigate darkspawn activity.

quests.name: Last of the Legion
quests.description: Explore Kal'Hirol and its darkspawn threat.

quests.name: Shadows of the Blackmarsh
quests.description: Investigate the mysterious Blackmarsh and its cursed inhabitants.

quests.name: Depths of Depravity
quests.description: Venture into the Deep Roads to confront the Mother.

quests.name: Oghren the Family Man
quests.description: Help Oghren reconnect with Felsi and his child in Awakening.

quests.name: The Howe Family
quests.description: Nathaniel Howe seeks answers about his family's downfall.

quests.name: Freedom for Anders
quests.description: Help Anders avoid recapture by the Templars.

quests.name: Justice for Kristoff
quests.description: Help the spirit of Justice inhabiting Kristoff's body.

quests.name: Witch Hunt
quests.description: Track down Morrigan and find the eluvian.
